params.prompt: Photorealistic editorial interior reference photograph of a Revive. Focus tightly on: vanity, mirror, bathroom tile, matte finishes and minimal ceramic accessories, soft folded towels. Styled in japandi aesthetic, warm_neutral palette, soft_ambient lighting. A calm, warm Japandi palette that blends Japanese minimalism with Scandinavian warmth. Prioritize natural materials, low-profile furniture, layered textiles, and restrained accessories. Create a cozy family-friendly environment by integrating a crib in the bedroom and a compact standing desk in a quiet living corner. Keep compositions breathable with negative space and a limited, warm-neutral palette. This image is a visual consistency reference — every detail of the featured furniture and fixtures must be clearly visible and precisely rendered. No people. No visible brand logos. Sharp architectural photography. Luxury real estate staging.
